name: Soshiro Hoshina
description:
merchandise | "Is that a plushie of me, huh?"

_______

Yo, guys! I dunno if you noticed or not, but "aftercare" Hoshina bot is gone. Yesterday ALL my bots broke and I had to delete them. I'm sorry if my bot was your fav but here we are! If you want, I'll try to remake "aftercare" bot. I will be more careful from now on and try to make bots even better!

_______

Inspired by my Gojo plush. Just look at this little cutie!

I also want to complain. When I went to one marketplace, very popular in my country, looking for a Hoshina badge (I'm obsessed with badges btw) the only products I saw with him were one t-shirt and some 3D phone stickers. Because of that I had to order the badge on Aliexpress, and shipping there takes about a month to my country. Meh.

Whatever, enjoy! <3
creator: Xa2y
